markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Ruben Vargas records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Switzerland vs Bosnia and Herzegovina professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Switzerland vs Bosnia and Herzegovina professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Ruben Vargas: 1+ goals

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Ivan Basic records the first goal for Bosnia and Herzegovina during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Switzerland vs Bosnia and Herzegovina professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Switzerland vs Bosnia and Herzegovina professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the team's first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored for that team.
markets.title: Ivan Basic: Bosnia and Herzegovina First Goalscorer

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Spencer Jones records 3+ hits in the Chicago WS vs New York Y professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 18, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Spencer Jones is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Spencer Jones starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Spencer Jones is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Spencer Jones is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Spencer Jones: 3+ hits?
